5cc1d9ec-3466-48c2-a943-8bb959db46d3.label: text_chunk
5cc1d9ec-3466-48c2-a943-8bb959db46d3.text:
Tel: +27 11 704 2440 | Fax: +27 086 407 4765 | email: info @ samed.org.za PO Box 651761, Benmore, 2010, South Africa | Hammets Crossing Office Park, No. 2 Selbourne  Avenue , Randburg
T.M.

 Vogt (Executive Officer) Directors: T Bourne, M Burgess, A Coetzee, A H Denoon, R Gabler,

2a459e77-2afe-4013-9c70-e3154f066103.label: text_chunk
2a459e77-2afe-4013-9c70-e3154f066103.text:
A Govender-Bester, J Hampton (Chairman), W Hodson, R Howes, R J Miller (Treasurer), T Moodley (Vice-Chairman), M Pearce, C Potter, T Tebeila, T Watson

CONFIDENTIALITY,

1028d12e-e922-43bf-b893-9de0fc7491b8.label: text_chunk
1028d12e-e922-43bf-b893-9de0fc7491b8.text:
NON-DISCLOSURE AND CONFLICT OF INTEREST AGREEMENT Ver 1 Adopted by the SAMED Board on: November 2013

Between
South African Medical Devices Industry Association (SAMED)
And
(who is a Member of the Board of SAMED and/or a member of SAMED Committee)
Hereinafter collectively “the parties”

1. Confidentiality Policy

1.

65a446cd-1c64-4f45-81bc-b8a8a80dd7d9.label: text_chunk
65a446cd-1c64-4f45-81bc-b8a8a80dd7d9.text: 1 The purpose of this agreement is to ensure that confidential matters brought before the Members  of  the  Board  of  SAMED  or  any  of  its  committees,  are  not  disclosed  until disclosure  is  properly  authorized.

71a032c7-d233-4ca2-8be1-5ea7fe45bab9.label: text_chunk
71a032c7-d233-4ca2-8be1-5ea7fe45bab9.text:
SAMED  Board  and  Committee  members  are  in positions  of  trust  towards  SAMED  as  a  voluntary  membership  organization,  and  such trust may require that elected and appointed persons act with the highest integrity and keep certain information confidential, and avoid conflicts of interest.

1.

a8f83da7-04a0-407f-9457-99197d387602.label: text_chunk
a8f83da7-04a0-407f-9457-99197d387602.text:
2  This  agreement  is  designed  to  provide  clarity  for  each  Board Member  and  Committee Member with regard to confidential matters that come before- or arise out of meetings and  matters  of  the  Members  of  the  Board  of  SAMED  or  any  of  its  committees,  and provides certainty as to how situations of conflict of interest are to be handled.

1.

3027ebfc-117b-4792-80a9-dc6b3a8ec5c4.label: text_chunk
3027ebfc-117b-4792-80a9-dc6b3a8ec5c4.text:
3  Its objective is to address matters of confidentiality in a manner that facilitates the Board, and Committees in maintaining the highest business and ethical standards, protects the integrity  of  SAMED,  the  Board,  and  Committees,  allows  for  appropriate  levels  of transparency  and  accountability  in  matters  before  the  Board,  and  supports  the maintenance of effective relationships among Board Members, SAMED and Committee Members.

2.

60359dca-c9b2-41c5-b858-a48e4dfd5804.label: text_chunk
60359dca-c9b2-41c5-b858-a48e4dfd5804.text:
Definitions

2.1 “Agreement” means this Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreement

2.2 "Board" means the Board of SAMED.

2.3 “Board Members” means members of the Board.

2.4 “Chair” means Chair of the Board.

2.5 "Committee" means a committee of the Board.

2.6 "Committee Members" means members of any Committee.

56b356d2-e1db-49c1-8e59-539efa632a38.label: text_chunk
56b356d2-e1db-49c1-8e59-539efa632a38.text:
2.7 "Meeting" means a meeting of the Board or a Committee, as applicable.

2.8 "Policy" means this Confidentiality Policy

2.9 “SAMED” means South African Medical Devices Industry Association

2.10 “Vice-Chair”, means Vice-Chair of the Board

3. The information

3.

1  "Information"  shall  for  the  purposes  of  this  agreement  include,  without  limitation,

7e337cb6-bb20-49ec-bccd-880f5c24afe2.label: text_chunk
7e337cb6-bb20-49ec-bccd-880f5c24afe2.text:
any technical,  commercial,  scientific  information,  know-how,  trade  secrets,  processes, machinery, designs, drawings, technical specifications, clients, prospects, historical and forecast  financial  information,  organisational  and  operational  structure  and  data  in whatever form, communicated to the receiving party or acquired by the receiving party from the disclosing party during the course of the parties' association with one another.

4.

eebe2dd0-cb06-4b28-ab30-bd63210b89b9.label: text_chunk
eebe2dd0-cb06-4b28-ab30-bd63210b89b9.text:
Confidentiality

4.1  Regular  Board  meetings  are,

  in  the  ordinary  course  of  events,  not  open  to  the  public and/or media.a) Members of SAMED may on invitation attend Board meetings.b) Once the Board has dealt with an issue in a board meeting and has decided on that matter, the issue is considered to be accessible to members to the extent of that decision.

7f0d2ea3-945b-4b13-b87b-5a51329b3341.label: text_chunk
7f0d2ea3-945b-4b13-b87b-5a51329b3341.text: Matters that  are so declared may be accessible  to the public at  large to the extent  so declared by the Board.c) All decisions that would be accessible to the general membership and/or the public at large will be recorded as such in the Board minutes.d) If no recordal is made, the matter, discussions and all resolutions should be deemed to be confidential unless declared by the Board by resolution as not confidential.

27f4422c-f7d3-4f05-aa20-5fbae5d1e3fc.label: text_chunk
27f4422c-f7d3-4f05-aa20-5fbae5d1e3fc.text: e) When considering  whether matters are confidential or not, the nature of SAMED as a membership  organization,  the  prospects  of  harm  to  SAMED  (including  harm  to  its reputation, good processes and procedures and good governance), as well as the impact of  any  such  decision  on  members  or  groups  of  members,  must,  amongst  others,  be considered.

5f3fbef2-9b09-4a13-b112-1e2af5cfcd64.label: text_chunk
5f3fbef2-9b09-4a13-b112-1e2af5cfcd64.text:
4.2 The Board also holds in-camera meetings,

 All present at any in-camera meeting will be bound  to  keep  the  proceedings  confidential,  unless  otherwise  directed  by  the Chairperson of the Board of Directors or any committee created by it with a support of the  majority.

08eb4276-ce21-4e3e-838f-9a7cfa7acc92.label: text_chunk
08eb4276-ce21-4e3e-838f-9a7cfa7acc92.text:
Exiting  and  re-entering  an  in  camera  session  will  be  permitted  with  the understanding that all present are obligated to keep the proceedings confidential.

4.

3  Non-members will be permitted to attend an in-camera session of the Board of Directors or any Committee created by it, only after a motion requesting attendance to an in camera session  is  approved  by  a  majority  vote  of  members  present  and  voting.

0ae1085b-6f27-49a9-b76f-8ec4f8467c53.label: text_chunk
0ae1085b-6f27-49a9-b76f-8ec4f8467c53.text:
External consultants  present  during  such  in  camera  sessions  may  be  required  to  preserve  the confidentiality of discussions during such a session.

4.

4  If  any person in attendance at a meeting of the Board of Directors or any Committee created by it, held in-camera, shall give notice of their intention not to be bound by the provisions of this by-law of SAMED, and refuse to leave the room when requested to do so,

a6ebf1ef-e9b1-443a-b7dc-addcd2abe27c.label: text_chunk
a6ebf1ef-e9b1-443a-b7dc-addcd2abe27c.text:
the  Chair  shall,  subject  to  a  resolution  of  the  board  supported  by  a  majority  vote, adjourn the meeting, after having informed members that it will be reconvened at a time and place of which the offending person will not be notified.

4.5  Committees  are  advisory  to  the  Board.

  Only  the  full  Board  makes  formal  decisions.

5103fe9e-02e9-4f21-b581-29da7fac6263.label: text_chunk
5103fe9e-02e9-4f21-b581-29da7fac6263.text:
Committee  meetings  are  held  in-camera,  and  their  recommendations  should  not  be discussed outside of the Committee or the Board. Discussions with others for the purpose of gathering input for committee consideration are acceptable and each Committee chair would have to exercise discretion and communication that decision to all present during a Committee meeting where an external person is present.

5. Conflict of Interest

5.

bd93d4b9-b20a-40ea-a04b-08962513371e.label: text_chunk
bd93d4b9-b20a-40ea-a04b-08962513371e.text:
1  A conflict of interest arises when there is a relationship which exists which could result in the Board or Committee member being perceived as being biased either for or against the topic of discussion.

5.2  Any Member of the SAMED Board, Executive,

 and/or Staff who has a personal interest, directly  or  indirectly,  in  any  contract,  transaction,  proposed  contract,  or  proposed transaction,

b25094f1-9ec5-4183-9106-0c843c8ced60.label: text_chunk
b25094f1-9ec5-4183-9106-0c843c8ced60.text:
under consideration of the Board of Directors or of a Committee created by it shall be deemed as being in a conflict of interest, where:

a) Contract is defined as any written or verbal agreement between two or more parties for the doing or not doing of something specified which is related to the matter at hand.

b) Transaction is defined as an exchange of money, services, goods, position,

 or favours are exchanged for money, services, goods, position or favours.

a6ef9a92-cdd4-44df-b9fa-43aea947aa49.label: text_chunk
a6ef9a92-cdd4-44df-b9fa-43aea947aa49.text:
c)  Interest  is  defined  as  any  instance  where  any  contract  or  transaction,

  proposed contract or proposed transaction could be to the benefit or detriment of themselves, family,  partners,  roommates/housemates,  other  organizations  to  which  they  are currently affiliated, that do not pertain to their job description or mandate.

5.

e3f0997d-97ed-4413-814f-54341a3f51d3.label: text_chunk
e3f0997d-97ed-4413-814f-54341a3f51d3.text:
3  Conflicts  of  interest  may  also  arise  in  matters  that  may  lead  to  a  direct  benefit  to  a particular Board member and/or his/her company, which position may conflict with either the law and/or codes of good practice and/or SAMED policy on a particular matter or the approach that should be taken to specific   types of matters.

5.

86c73c53-7c0a-493b-9a66-0d2d760c8cfe.label: text_chunk
86c73c53-7c0a-493b-9a66-0d2d760c8cfe.text: 4 Where the Board of Directors or a Committee created by it is of the opinion that a conflict of interest exists that has not been declared, the Board of Directors or Committee may declare, by a resolution carried by two-thirds of the members present and voting at the meeting, that a conflict of interest exists and that the member found in conflict shall follow the procedure below.

8a4ce3b9-64bc-46eb-9a74-d6958215e51d.label: text_chunk
8a4ce3b9-64bc-46eb-9a74-d6958215e51d.text:
5.5 In the event of a conflict of interest, the interested party shall:

a)  Prior to any vote on the issue,

 declare the conflict of interest to the Chair or Board as a whole.

b)  Refrain from voting in relation to the matter.

c)  Withdraw from the meeting when the matter is discussed if requested to do so by a simple majority of the members present and voting at the meeting.

6. Breaches

6.

26a370de-be0d-4402-b8d1-b233f63cf213.label: text_chunk
26a370de-be0d-4402-b8d1-b233f63cf213.text: 1 A breach of this Confidentiality  and Conflict of Interest Agreement may result in action being  taken  against  the  member  (up  to  and  including  removal  from  the  Board  and/or SAMED Committee).

7d216327-297c-49ec-8b62-2641e21e7c0b.label: text_chunk
7d216327-297c-49ec-8b62-2641e21e7c0b.text:
6.2 In the case of a breach by a Board or Committee Member,

 the Board will determine what steps  should  be  taken  under  the  circumstances  (provided  that  consideration  of  the removal  of  a  Board member  shall  be on  thirty  (30)  days  notice  to  the  Board  Member.

3db152b6-5fc7-4b30-aad8-62c6eb84f802.label: text_chunk
3db152b6-5fc7-4b30-aad8-62c6eb84f802.text:
After thirty (30) days notice to the Board Member, the Board,  may remove the person from the Board through the applicable provisions and procedures created by the SAMED Constitution.

7. Terms

7.

1 This agreement shall commence upon the date of signature by both parties (“the effective date") to this agreement and shall continue to bind the parties for the duration of one year.

45b7872d-648e-4000-aceb-3e267880ea51.label: text_chunk
45b7872d-648e-4000-aceb-3e267880ea51.text:
A new agreement must be signed should a person be re-elected or re- appointed as a Board- and/or Committee member.

8. Additional action

8.

1  Each  party  to  this agreement  shall  execute  and  deliver  such  other  documents  and  do such other acts and things as may be necessary or desirable to give effect to the terms and  provisions  of  this  agreement.

b1954f61-7f02-4ee7-a6c4-e23029c98ef9.label: text_chunk
b1954f61-7f02-4ee7-a6c4-e23029c98ef9.text:
This  may  include  the  return  and/or  distraction  of documents, information, files, emails and the like that came to be in his/her possession during  his/her  tenure  as  a  Board-  and/or  Committee  member,  upon  resignation  or removal from such a position.

9.

45ebdc71-475b-430c-b1e2-7787d2a8f1e1.label: text_chunk
45ebdc71-475b-430c-b1e2-7787d2a8f1e1.text:
Amendments

9.1 No amendment,

 interpretation or waiver of any of the provisions of this agreement shall be effective unless reduced to writing and signed by both the parties.

10. Entire agreement

10.

1 This agreement contains the entire agreement of the parties with respect to the subject matter  of  this  agreement  and  supersedes  all  prior  agreements  between  the  parties, whether written or oral, with respect to the subject matter of this agreement.

92f1c9d0-8d31-4cef-aad5-63085c53b732.label: text_chunk
92f1c9d0-8d31-4cef-aad5-63085c53b732.text:
11. Governing law

11.

1 This agreement and the relationship of the parties in connection with the subject matter of  this  agreement  shall  be  governed  and  determined  in  accordance  with  the  laws  of South Africa.

12. Severability

12.

1 In the event of any one or more of the provisions of this agreement being held for any reason to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable in any respect,

166033ba-2721-418c-b445-dbf133c9e088.label: text_chunk
166033ba-2721-418c-b445-dbf133c9e088.text:
such invalidity, illegality or unenforceability  shall  not  affect  any  other  provision  of  this  agreement,  and  this agreement shall be construed as if such invalid, illegal or unenforceable provision was not  a  part  of  this  agreement,  and  the  agreement  shall  be  carried  out  as  nearly  as possible in accordance with its original terms and intent.

13.

908fe51a-fc4b-4f90-b611-0ff3346cfec5.label: text_chunk
908fe51a-fc4b-4f90-b611-0ff3346cfec5.text:
Undertaking Respecting Confidentiality and Conflicts of Interest

Whereas,  and  based on  the  above  rules,  from  time  to  time,  arising  out  of  the  relationship between the undersigned and the Board and/or any Committee of SAMED, the undersigned shall  come  into  possession  or  have  knowledge  of  certain  matters,  information  and  things which are confidential, i.e.

8686a25d-4978-48f6-b27d-5f8490671a7a.label: text_chunk
8686a25d-4978-48f6-b27d-5f8490671a7a.text:
“confidential information and s/he may be in situations of conflict as outlined in the aforementioned provisions, therefore the person declares as follows:
I have read the above undertakings and certify that I fully understand the nature and effect of these undertakings, and acknowledge receipt of a copy thereof.I further agree to be bound by the rules of confidentiality and conflict of interest as  set  out  above.

6ff95e78-a7f5-4a10-b728-ee67637f651d.label: text_chunk
6ff95e78-a7f5-4a10-b728-ee67637f651d.text: I  also  understand  the  need  for  these  requirements  and  I believe I can meet the requirements as set out above.Signed at                                                            on For Board / Committee Member: Full names and surname of Signature For SAMED: Full names and surname Signature

Organizational structure refers to the way in which a company is arranged, including its hierarchy, roles, and responsibilities within the organization.
Operational data includes information related to the day-to-day functioning of a business, such as processes, workflows, and performance metrics.

properties.relationship_description: The Board has the authority to declare which matters are accessible to the public, indicating a direct relationship between the Board's decisions and the public's access to information.

Partners are individuals who are in a relationship, often sharing responsibilities and benefits in personal or business contexts.
Roommates are individuals who share living accommodations, typically sharing expenses and responsibilities.
Organizations are structured groups of people working together to achieve common goals, which can include businesses, non-profits, or other affiliations.

Confidentiality and Conflict of Interest.label: Legal Document

properties.entity_description: A formal agreement that outlines the obligations of parties to maintain confidentiality and avoid conflicts of interest, particularly in a professional or organizational context.

Confidentiality and Conflict of Interest.name: Confidentiality and Conflict of Interest Agreement

community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.

2. **Regulation 070** and **vehicle impact protection devices**: Regulation 070 stipulates the necessity for installing vehicle impact protection devices. This regulation aims to enhance safety in areas that are close to outdoor pedestrian seating, ensuring the protection of pedestrians in these environments. 

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of regulatory compliance and organizational agreements in the development and safety measures of urban infrastructure projects.

The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and operational dependencies between various entities:

1. **Planning Department and CEQA**: The Planning Department is required to comply with the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) regulations when reviewing development projects. This establishes a critical regulatory relationship that ensures environmental considerations are integrated into planning processes.

2. **Traffic Signals and Backup Power System**: Traffic signals necessitate a backup power system to ensure they remain operational during power outages. This relationship emphasizes the importance of maintaining traffic safety and functionality, highlighting the need for reliable infrastructure in urban planning.

In summary, the Planning Department's adherence to CEQA regulations is essential for responsible development oversight, while the requirement for traffic signals to have a backup power system underscores the importance of continuous operation for public safety.

community_summary.49: The Birdview Avenue Improvements project is overseen by CalOES, establishing a direct management relationship between the project and the California Office of Emergency Services (CalOES). This indicates that CalOES is responsible for the administration and execution of the improvements on Birdview Avenue.
community_summary.50: In this relationship summary, the key entities involved are the Project and the Council. The relationship indicates that the Council formally accepted the Project, signifying an endorsement or approval from this governing body. This approval is crucial as it reflects the Council's support and validation of the Project's objectives and plans.
community_summary.51:
The relationships involving the City highlight its multifaceted role in managing public infrastructure and safety initiatives. 

1. **Capital Improvements Projects**: The City manages and oversees various Capital Improvements Projects aimed at enhancing public infrastructure, demonstrating its commitment to community development.

2. **Staff Employment**: The City employs staff who are integral to its operations, indicating a structured municipal organization that relies on its workforce to implement various projects and services.

3. **FEMA Hazard Mitigation Grant**: The City has been awarded a FEMA Hazard Mitigation grant, which signifies its role as a recipient of federal funding aimed at improving disaster resilience and safety measures.

4. **Emergency Warning Sirens**: The City oversees the implementation of the Emergency Warning Sirens project, which includes managing project activities and applying for future funding to ensure the system's effectiveness in public safety.

Overall, these relationships underscore the City's responsibilities in infrastructure management, staff employment, disaster preparedness, and public safety initiatives.
community_summary.52:
The relationships outlined involve the entity "Construction Bids" and its connection to the timeline of construction activities. 

1. **Construction Bids** are set to **initiate** the commencement of construction, which is expected to begin in **Fall 2022**. This indicates that the bidding process is a precursor to the actual construction work.

2. The **Scheduled To Begin** phase is linked to **Construction Bids** in **Spring 2022**, highlighting that bids will be solicited during this period in preparation for the construction that is anticipated to start in Fall 2022.

In summary, the construction bidding process is a critical step that will lead to the start of construction in Fall 2022, with bids being actively solicited in Spring 2022 to facilitate this timeline.
community_summary.53: The CalOES Project is a significant initiative focused on infrastructure improvements, specifically involving the repairs to Westward Beach Road. The project has a defined timeline, with the completion of the design phase for the Malibu Road slope repairs scheduled for Summer 2022. This timeline underscores the project's progress and its connection to the specific location of Westward Beach Road, highlighting the importance of these repairs in enhancing the area's infrastructure.
community_summary.54: The Point Dume Decomposed Granite Walkway Repair Project is directly linked to the Woolsey Fire, which caused significant damage to the sidewalk sections. This event necessitated the initiation of the repair project to restore the affected areas. The relationship highlights the impact of the Woolsey Fire on local infrastructure, emphasizing the need for subsequent repair efforts.
